prompt: Create a dramatic dark fantasy anime key art illustration in the style of high-detail Korean action RPG promotional art, featuring a mysterious female archmage standing in a ruined cathedral under a starry night sky. She has long flowing silver-white hair with lavender highlights, an elegant curvy silhouette, and a white-and-black ornate sorceress outfit: cropped white hooded cloak with gold embroidery, black corset bodice, layered white skirt panels, belts, chains, dangling charms, thigh straps, sheer black stockings, and tall dark boots. Her face is intentionally covered by a soft-edged square blur censor block, while her body and costume remain sharply detailed. She extends her left hand toward the viewer, conjuring a glowing purple magical orb inside a golden astrolabe-like ring with sparks and arcane energy; her right hand holds an ancient dark spellbook with gold filigree. Behind her is a huge circular celestial clock or magic sigil halo with radial lines and constellations, broken stone pillars, flying parchment, torn white ribbons, violet smoke, and distant ruins. Add the white stylized logo text Dungeon & Fighter in the top-left corner. Use cinematic rim lighting, purple and gold highlights, high contrast shadows, intricate linework, dynamic flowing hair and fabric, ultra-detailed fantasy illustration, vertical poster composition, polished game splash art quality.
